vulnerabilities.title: i18next-http-backend has Path Traversal & URL Injection via Unsanitised lng/ns
vulnerabilities.description:
### Summary

Versions of `i18next-http-backend` prior to 3.0.5 interpolate the `lng` and `ns` values directly into the configured `loadPath` / `addPath` URL template without any encoding, validation, or path sanitisation. When an application exposes the language-code selection to user-controlled input (the default — `i18next-browser-languagedetector` reads `?lng=` query params, cookies, `localStorage`, and request headers), an attacker can inject characters that change the structure of the outgo
